title: taxonomy-describe output contract (K1)
description: Body of POST /agent/v1/taxonomy/describe. Every item becomes a promotions row kind='desc' — moderated, never a direct tree write.

nodeId.description: Taxonomy node id exactly as served by describe/pending

descriptionEn.description: Canonical description — becomes the node's FTS + embedding text

descriptionCs.description: Czech localization carrying the same conceptual boundaries

rationale.description: One sentence naming the evidence (children, siblings, domain knowledge)
